meaning: adj.被派任为主角,点缀着星星的
examples: John Agar starred in westerns, war films and low-budget science fiction pictures.
The previous year Adolphson had starred in a play in which Ingrid had been an extra.
At Michelin-starred Glass Hostaria, Cordon Bleu-trained chef Cristina Bowerman whips up a creative menu that changes frequently.
Four big-screen, big-budget features, from 1978 to 1987, starred Christopher Reeve as the Man of Steel.
